category_sources: Official Fedify CLI documentation describes the `fedify` command as a CLI toolchain for Fedify and ActivityPub-enabled federated server apps.
source_facts.description says this is the CLI toolchain for Fedify.
display_name_sources: Official Fedify CLI documentation names the command `fedify`.
docs_sources: Official Fedify CLI page is the dedicated documentation page for the Homebrew-provided command.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/fedify-dev/fedify; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Fedify CLI documentation describes debugging ActivityPub-enabled federated server apps.
source_facts.description identifies the Fedify CLI toolchain.
